channel.title: The Measured Life — averagejoematt
channel.description: The weekly chronicle of an ordinary life, measured in full — every number, every week, including the weeks it dips. Written by Elena Voss.

item.title: The Wall
item.description: "The Wall" [Weight: 300.8 lbs | Week Grade: avg 57 | T0 Streak: 0 days] The week started with a 126-minute pull session at 5:19 in the morning. That's the last thing Matthew did that the system could call unambiguous. A Tuesday, before dawn, in the rain — the kind of Seattle June that doesn't apo

item.title: The Week That Decided to Begin
item.description: "The Week That Decided to Begin" [Weight: 305.1 lbs | Week Grade: avg 66 | T0 Streak: 1 day] The protein shake was lukewarm. That's the detail I keep coming back to from the morning the machine finally turned on. He was standing at his kitchen counter at 5 AM, not quite awake, stirring something

item.title: The Empty Journal
item.description: "The Empty Journal" Here is something I did not expect to find while shadowing a man in the weeks before his experiment formally began: someone who has built twenty-seven automated programs to monitor his sleep, his blood glucose, his heart rate recovery, his gait symmetry, and whether he remembere

item.title: The Body Votes First
item.description: "The Body Votes First" The first thing Matthew Walker shows me when I sit down with him on a Thursday evening is not a chart. It's a number. Twenty. As in 20% recovery — the score his Whoop band assigned to his body on the final morning of a week in early June, before the machine I'd come to docume
